rds.dbclusterparametergroup.CfnAbout:
The `AWS::RDS::DBClusterParameterGroup` resource creates a new Amazon RDS DB cluster parameter group.

For information about configuring parameters for Amazon Aurora DB clusters, see [Working with parameter groups](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonRDS/latest/AuroraUserGuide/USER_WorkingWithParamGroups.html) in the *Amazon Aurora User Guide*.

**Note**  
If you apply a parameter group to a DB cluster, then its DB instances might need to reboot. This can result in an outage while the DB instances are rebooting.  
If you apply a change to parameter group associated with a stopped DB cluster, then the update stack waits until the DB cluster is started.

rds.dbclusterparametergroup.DBClusterPar.Description: The name of the DB cluster parameter group.  Constraints:  + Must not match the name of an existing DB cluster parameter group.If you don't specify a value for `DBClusterParameterGroupName` property, a name is automatically created for the DB cluster parameter group.  This value is stored as a lowercase string.

rds.dbclusterparametergroup.Description.Description: A friendly description for this DB cluster parameter group.

rds.dbclusterparametergroup.Parameters.Description: Provides a list of parameters for the DB cluster parameter group.

rds.dbclusterparametergroup.Tags.Description: An optional array of key-value pairs to apply to this DB cluster parameter group.
